raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Settling in","name":"How has week three felt from your side, Sam?","description":"Safe opener that lets Sam set context before anything specific is raised.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"settling","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Ticket shape","name":"What feels clearest about your current tickets?","description":"Surfaces what parts of the work and expectations have already clicked.","purpose":"topic","stage":"orientation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Done means what","name":"What does 'done' mean to you on a ticket right now?","description":"Checks whether Sam has a usable internal bar for shipping and review.","purpose":"competency","stage":"orientation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Handoff gaps","name":"Where are the handoffs still fuzzy for you?","description":"Finds the exact transition points where Sam is compensating or guessing.","purpose":"topic","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Waiting on","name":"What are you waiting on most often before you can move a ticket forward?","description":"Identifies hidden dependency points that slow him down.","purpose":"topic","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Shipping hesitation","name":"What makes you hold back before you ship?","description":"Surfaces whether the hesitation is about confidence, tooling, or unclear standards.","purpose":"competency","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support rhythm","name":"What kind of check-in would make the next two weeks steadier for you?","description":"Helps line up a concrete support cadence Sam can actually use.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"connection","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Go-to people","name":"Who have you found easiest to go to when you get stuck?","description":"Surfaces which relationships are already working and where support can be routed.","purpose":"topic","stage":"connection","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next support","name":"What support from me would help you move faster this fortnight?","description":"Closes on a concrete manager action for the next stretch of onboarding.","purpose":"topic","stage":"connection","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]}]}
